base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hero_chain_armor_walk — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Hero in chain mail — 4-dir × 2-frame walk. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Hero in chain mail — 4-dir × 2-frame walk; metallic gray/silver sprite variant
